codeReview.summary: The flow is implemented with all four screens and routes, but the happy-path terminal navigation does not return to Dashboard as required by the validation contract.

issues.description: The 'Return to Signer' action navigates to '/' (Welcome) instead of returning to Dashboard. This breaks VAL-ROTATESH-004 ('Return to Signer' goes to Dashboard) and VAL-ROTATESH-005 (happy path ends at Dashboard).
Test expectation enshrines the wrong terminal navigation by asserting navigate('/') for 'Return to Signer', masking the contract mismatch instead of catching it.
A user-visible 'Simulate Failure' debug button is shipped on the Applying screen but is not part of the rotate-share design/spec content.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-builder skill mandates tests-first TDD (write failing tests before implementation), but transcript order shows implementation file creation before test creation and no failing-test phase. Handoff still reports followedProcedure=true, suggesting enforcement/feedback drift.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/ui-builder/SKILL.md ("Write Tests First (TDD)") vs transcript skeleton for session 46e5ab42-410c-4426-9901-6db39619d1bc: Create src/screens/RotateShareScreens.tsx occurs before Create src/screens/__tests__/RotateShareScreens.test.tsx.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Architecture shared reference route table is stale and omits rotate-keyset and rotate-share routes, reducing usefulness for reviewers/workers validating current navigation behavior.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md route table has no rotate-share/rotate-keyset entries; grep for 'rotate-share|rotate-keyset' returns no matches.

summary: Review failed due to a blocking flow mismatch: Local Share Updated's 'Return to Signer' goes to Welcome instead of Dashboard, violating rotate-share happy-path expectations. Additional non-blocking findings include a test that codifies the wrong destination and a user-facing debug control on the Applying screen.
